query_string: INSERT INTO bench.events (user_id, event_ts, payload) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO bench.events (user_id, event_ts, payload) VALUES (?, ?, ?) USING TTL 3600
UPDATE bench.profile SET name = ? WHERE user_id = ? USING TTL 86400
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bench.events WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT MAX(event_ts), MIN(event_ts) FROM bench.events WHERE user_id = ?
BEGIN UNLOGGED BATCH INSERT INTO bench.events (user_id, event_ts) VALUES (?, ?) IF NOT EXISTS; INSERT INTO bench.events (user_id, event_ts) VALUES (?, ?); APPLY BATCH
BEGIN UNLOGGED BATCH INSERT INTO bench.events (user_id, event_ts) VALUES (?, ?); INSERT INTO bench.events (user_id, event_ts) VALUES (?, ?); APPLY BATCH
SELECT bench.normalize_email(email) FROM bench.users WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT system.now() FROM bench.events WHERE user_id = ?
